I apologize but I could not find any reliable sources about the plant Hieracium amnoon. However, I can provide you with information about Hieracium species in general.

Hieracium species, commonly known as hawkweeds, are a genus of flowering plants in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). They are known for their potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium species include flavonoids, sesquiterpene lactones, and phenolic acids, which contribute to their medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Hieracium species are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
